debug_info.goal:
G : Type u_8
hG : MeasurableSpace G
inst✝² : AddCommGroup G
inst✝¹ : MeasurableSingletonClass G
inst✝ : Countable G
m : ℕ
hm : m ≥ 2
Ω : Fin m → Type u_9
hΩ : (i : Fin m) → MeasureSpace (Ω i)
X : (i : Fin m) → Ω i → G
⊢ (∑ j, ∑ k, if j = k then 0 else d[X j # -X k]) ≤ ↑m * (↑m - 1) * @multiDist G hG inst✝² m Ω hΩ X

proof:
let μ := fun i ↦ (hΩ i).volume.map (X i)
  let ν := Measure.pi μ
  let Y : Fin m → (Fin m → G) → G := fun i x ↦ x i
  have hYI : iIndepFun Y ν := iIndepFun_pi μ
  have hX i : H[X i] = H[Y i ; ν] := by simp [H, Y, ν, μ]
  have h_rdist j k (hjk : j ≠ k) : d[X j # -X k] = H[Y j + Y k ; ν] - (H[Y j ; ν] + H[Y k ; ν]) / 2 := by
    have : IndepFun (Y j) (Y k) ν := hYI.indepFun hjk
    rw [rdist_eq_rdist_dist, this.rdist_eq (measurable_pi_apply j) (measurable_pi_apply k)]
    simp [H, Y, ν, μ]
  have h_le j k (hjk : j ≠ k) : H[Y j + Y k ; ν] ≤ H[fun x ↦ ∑ i, x i ; ν] := sorry
  calc
    ∑ j, ∑ k, (if j = k then 0 else d[X j # -X k])
    _ = ∑ j, ∑ k, (if j = k then 0 else (H[Y j + Y k ; ν] - (H[Y j ; ν] + H[Y k ; ν]) / 2)) := by
      congr; ext j; congr; ext k; split_ifs with h; rfl; exact h_rdist j k h
    _ ≤ ∑ j, ∑ k, (if j = k then 0 else (H[fun x ↦ ∑ i, x i ; ν] - (H[Y j ; ν] + H[Y k ; ν]) / 2)) := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _; apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro k _; split_ifs with h; rfl
      exact sub_le_sub_right (h_le j k h) _
    _ = m * (m - 1) * H[fun x ↦ ∑ i, x i ; ν] - (m - 1) * ∑ i, H[Y i ; ν] := by
      simp_rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_univ, Fintype.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul]
      simp_rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_const, ← Finset.sum_mul]
      rw [Finset.sum_comm]
      simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_univ, Fintype.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul]
      ring
    _ = m * (m - 1) * D[X; hΩ] := by
      rw [multiDist, hX, mul_sub, mul_inv_cancel_left₀ (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by linarith)))]
      · ring
      · exact_mod_cast (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by linarith))
